name: Indiana
why_ruby_pro: Indiana ATC licensing compliance built into every transaction
Excise tax calculations aligned with Indiana Code Title 7.1 schedules
Three-tier enforcement so every sale routes through the proper channel
problem: ATC license tracking scattered across emails and spreadsheets
Indiana Title 7.1 excise calculations done manually after delivery
Three-tier compliance gaps discovered only during audits
difference: Auto-validate ATC license status on every account before order entry
Indiana excise tax computed and recorded at the transaction level
Three-tier route rules enforced system-wide, not case by case
how_it_works: Each account stores ATC license type and expiry — alerts fire automatically
Title 7.1 excise rates applied per SKU at order confirmation
Route profitability reports show margin across all Indiana territories
